notes: Confirmed via source code inspection: Blazor SKGLView.razor.cs declares GRContext as a private field (line 24) with no public property, while all 13 other GPU-backed views in SkiaSharp expose it publicly via `public GRContext GRContext => context;`. This is a valid enhancement request for API parity, not a bug. Multi-version testing skipped per enhancement reproduction rules.

reproductionSteps.description: Inspect Blazor SKGLView.razor.cs for GRContext accessibility
Verify all other GPU views expose GRContext publicly — found 13 instances across macOS, iOS, Android, WPF, WinForms, WinUI, Metal, and Tizen views
Confirm no public GRContext property exists in Blazor SKGLView — zero matches confirms the feature is missing

versionResults.notes: Reporter's version. Feature request — GRContext was private in Blazor SKGLView since its introduction. Not a regression.
Latest stable. GRContext is still private in current source. Feature has never been implemented.

actionability.reason: Valid enhancement request for API parity. All 13 other GPU-backed views expose GRContext publicly; the Blazor SKGLView is the only one that does not. Trivial one-line fix.

actions.description: Apply enhancement and Blazor views labels
Link to original GRContext exposure issue #358

workarounds: Access GRContext via e.Surface.Context inside the OnPaintSurface callback (returns GRRecordingContext, cast to GRContext if needed)
